titleStmt.title: SII 25.100: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 100. (A.R. No. 100 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
This inscription may be assigned to 12th Century on grounds of palaeography.

It records the grant of income from taxes kaḍamai and antarāyam on lands in Nārāyaṇamaṅgalam by Tiruvālanduṟaiyuḍaiyāṉ Tirukkoḍunguṉṟamuḍaiyāṉ alias Nishādha-rājaṉ of Poṉṉamarāpati in Puṟamalai-nāḍu, for the feeding of Śrīmāhēśvaras on festival days probably in the maṭha. The village was endowed as maḍappuṟam to Tiruchchiṟṟambalam [Tiru]vāchagartirumaḍam located at the western entrance in the temple of Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍanāyaṉār of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu.

Nishādharājan bearing the surname Tirukkoḍuṅguṉṟam-uḍaiyāṉ is probably identical with his namesake who figures in a record of the 25th year of the reign of Kulōttuṅga I (acc. 1070 A.D.) from Śivapuri who inturn is identical with Nishādharājar who held the office of Śrīkāryam of the temple at Śrīraṅgam. (See, S.I.I., Vol. XXIV, No. 83).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svasti śrī . tribhuvanacakravattikaḷ śrī kulacekara tevaṟ
ku yāṇṭu 9vatu puṟamalaināṭṭu poṉṉamarāpatit tiru
vālan=tuṟaiyuṭaiyāṉ tirukkoṭuṅkuṉṟamuṭaiyāṉāṉa
niṣadharājaneṉ keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyan=tirupput
tūrt tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyanār śrīkoyilil melait tiruvā
calil tirucciṟṟampalam tiruvākar tirumaṭattukku tirumaṭa
rāyaṇam
paṭṭa Iṟaiku
ṭimaiyuṭpaṭa taṉ kaṭamai An=tarāya muṟṟum śrīmāheśva
raṟkut tirunāḷ tiruvamutupaṭiyāl cantrādityavaṟ celva
tāka nirvārttuk kuṭutteṉ tirukkoṭuṅkuṉ
ṟa muṭaiyāṉāṉa niṣadharājaneṉ In=ta dhammam ra
kṣippār śrīpāda meṉtalai melaṉa I
Digital edition of SII 25.100 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
